audit_summary.summary_text: The monorepo-navigator skill is well-aligned with its stated purpose. The implementation reads local workspace config files (package.json, pnpm-workspace.yaml), uses glob patterns for directory discovery, and invokes 'git diff' to identify affected packages — all of which are consistent with declared monorepo navigation functionality. No network exfiltration, credential harvesting, instruction overrides, obfuscated code, or reverse shell logic was detected. The 'External Package References' section lists registry URLs as documentation only; no corresponding code fetches data from these endpoints, so no network transmission occurs. The subprocess call is limited to a read-only git command with no user-controlled injection vector in the static code path.
